pain_points.pain_desc: After accepting urgent orders, manual rescheduling takes hours and disrupts other orders, causing floor chaos.
pain_points.solution_desc: Full-plant reschedule within 5 minutes of rush order insertion. Displays impact scope, auto-negotiates delivery dates, manager approves with one click.

pain_points.pain_desc: Production plans ignore material arrival timing, causing frequent 'machine waiting for material' or 'material arrived with no machine available' situations.
pain_points.solution_desc: APS integrates ERP/WMS material data — only schedules work orders where material, machine, and labor are all available, eliminating waiting waste.

pain_points.pain_desc: No systematic changeover management, similar parts not grouped in scheduling, losing over 2 hours of utilization per day to changeovers.
pain_points.solution_desc: Auto-groups by tooling, color, and material similarity to minimize changeovers. Average changeover time reduced by 60%.

features.title: Finite-Capacity Scheduling Engine
features.short: Generates executable schedules considering machine, labor, and tooling constraints
features.detail:
Traditional ERP 'infinite capacity' scheduling often results in plans that can't be executed. APS finite-capacity engine integrates:

• Machine availability windows and maintenance plans
• Operator shift schedules and skill matrices
• Tooling lifespan and cleaning cycles
• Material arrival dates and inventory levels

Using multi-objective optimization (genetic algorithm + local search), it generates optimal schedules balancing due dates, utilization, and inventory within minutes — visualized as interactive Gantt charts.

features.title: Tooling Assignment Optimization
features.short: Auto-matches tools to work orders to extend tool life and reduce changeover cost
features.detail:
Tooling management is a core pain point in precision manufacturing. APS tooling assignment module:

• Tracks cumulative usage count and remaining lifespan for each tool
• Auto-filters qualified tools by product specifications
• Prioritizes tools approaching maintenance thresholds to avoid scrapping
• Calculates cross-order tool transfer paths to minimize idle waiting
• Integrates maintenance scheduling to ensure tooling maintenance doesn't conflict with production

features.title: Changeover Sequence Optimization
features.short: Similarity-based grouping to drastically compress changeover losses
features.detail:
Changeover optimization uses a 'similarity matrix' algorithm:

• Calculates similarity scores across material, color, dimension, and tooling dimensions
• Solves shortest changeover path using Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP)
• Supports industry conventions like 'light to dark color ordering'
• Graphical changeover Gantt for floor staff confirmation
• Feedback loop: records actual changeover times to continuously refine prediction model

features.title: Multi-Plant / Multi-Line Coordination
features.short: Cross-plant order distribution to balance capacity and inventory across facilities
features.detail:
Group manufacturers often face uneven order distribution across plants. APS multi-plant coordination module:

• Creates a group-level capacity view showing utilization across all plants
• Auto-assigns orders to optimal facilities based on process capability, transport cost, and due dates
• Inter-plant WIP transfer planning and tracking
• Consolidated purchasing material demand aggregation to reduce fragmented procurement cost
• Bi-directional sync between Master Production Schedule (MPS) and plant-level MES

features.title: Decision Analytics Dashboard
features.short: Real-time KPI monitoring, schedule simulation, and fast decision support
features.detail:
The APS dashboard doesn't just display data — it provides decision recommendations:

• Due date risk alerts: flags orders likely to be late 3 days in advance
• Capacity heat map: visually shows machine load by time slot
• Schedule scenario simulator: compare 'shortest lead time' vs 'highest utilization' strategies
• Schedule stability score: quantifies resistance to disruption by rush orders
• One-click export of customer delivery confirmation letters and internal production plans

features.title: Materials Sync Planning
features.short: ERP/WMS integration to ensure scheduling only starts when all three resources are ready
features.detail:
'Material without machine, machine without material' is the biggest waste in manufacturing. APS materials sync engine:

• Real-time read of expected arrival dates from ERP purchase orders
• Calculates earliest available time for materials needed per work order
• Auto-pushes schedule start time forward to ensure materials are ready at job start
• Safety stock buffer configuration to handle supplier delay risk
• Material shortage alerts: notifies procurement to expedite before shortages occur

cases.challenge: Sales frequently accepted urgent orders. Manual rescheduling took over 4 hours and often caused delays on other orders, resulting in constant customer complaints.
cases.result: After APS deployment, rush order rescheduling dropped to 5 minutes. On-time delivery rate rose from 72% to 97%, greatly boosting sales confidence.

cases.challenge: No systematic tooling changeover management. Daily changeover losses exceeded 2 hours of utilization. WIP buildup caused capital lock-up and space shortages.
cases.result: After changeover sequence optimization, average changeover time reduced by 58%. Utilization rose from 61% to 84%. WIP inventory reduced by 40%.

solutions.title: Three AI Agent Modules
solutions.subtitle: Built on the Argox AI Engine, CRIS delivers ready-to-deploy AI Agent solutions covering Finance, Service, and Manufacturing.
solutions.module_1_desc: Connects to enterprise ERP systems, auto-analyzes financial data, and generates all five core financial statements — P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Equity Changes, and Ratios — in one click.
solutions.module_2_desc: Uses RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) to build a private knowledge base from product manuals and troubleshooting docs. AI agents deliver instant, accurate technical Q&A and after-sales support.
solutions.module_3_desc: Integrates AIoT sensor streams to continuously monitor equipment vibration, temperature, and current. AI predicts failure risk before downtime occurs and auto-dispatches maintenance orders.

items.title: ERP Financial Report Simulation
items.challenge: Month-end financials took 3 days of manual work with high error rates
items.solution: AI Agent auto-connects to major ERPs and generates all 5 core financial statements
items.benefit: Report time cut from 3 days to 5 minutes — 80% labor savings
items.detail_challenge: Finance teams spent 3+ working days each month manually exporting data from multiple ERP modules and calculating P&L, balance sheets, and other reports. Manual errors caused inconsistencies and high audit risk.
items.detail_solution: AI Agent auto-connects to SAP, Yonyou, and Digiwin ERPs, pulling raw financial data in real time and generating all five core statements — P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Equity Changes, and Financial Ratios — with zero manual intervention.
items.detail_benefit: Report generation time dropped from 3 days to 5 minutes (864× efficiency). Finance staff workload reduced 80%, data accuracy reached 99.8%, and month-end stress was dramatically reduced.

items.title: IPO Compliance Agent
items.challenge: IPO documentation was complex, and compliance review consumed excessive consultant hours
items.solution: AI Agent auto-scans financial documents and flags non-compliant items
items.benefit: Compliance review efficiency up 60%, advisory cycle shortened 2 months
items.detail_challenge: Companies preparing for IPO needed to review massive volumes of financial and legal documents for regulatory compliance. Manual review was slow and prone to omissions, repeatedly delaying the advisory timeline.
items.detail_solution: AI Agent automatically parses financial reports and prospectuses, performs semantic comparison against IPO regulatory requirements, flags non-compliant items, and provides specific correction recommendations. Consultants only need to review AI-flagged issues.
items.detail_benefit: Compliance review efficiency up 60%, consultant review time per session reduced from 3 days to 1 day, overall IPO advisory cycle shortened by an average of 2 months, significantly reducing advisory costs.

items.title: Procurement Data Analytics
items.challenge: Procurement data scattered across systems — no real-time visibility into supplier performance
items.solution: AI integrates multi-source procurement data with dynamic dashboards and anomaly alerts
items.benefit: Procurement cost down 12%, anomalous orders flagged 3 days in advance
items.detail_challenge: Procurement data was scattered across ERP, email, and Excel. Managers lacked real-time visibility into supplier on-time rates, pricing trends, and costs — decisions were reactive rather than proactive.
items.detail_solution: AI integrates ERP and supplier systems into a unified procurement intelligence layer, auto-builds supplier performance scoring models, provides real-time dashboards, and pushes alerts for pricing anomalies and delivery risks.
items.detail_benefit: Procurement costs reduced 12%, supplier on-time delivery improved 18%, anomalous orders flagged an average of 3 days early, and procurement decision quality significantly improved.

items.title: n8n Smart Service System
items.challenge: Support staff spent hours answering repetitive questions — customers waited 4+ hours
items.solution: RAG knowledge base AI Agent providing 24/7 instant technical Q&A
items.benefit: First-contact resolution up to 85%, support workload down 50%
items.detail_challenge: Support teams received high volumes of repetitive technical inquiries — equipment operation guides, troubleshooting steps, etc. Manually searching documents and responding took hours, and customer satisfaction declined steadily.
items.detail_solution: Built on n8n automation and RAG technology, product manuals, technical documents, and FAQs are ingested into a private knowledge base. AI Agent understands customer queries, retrieves relevant content instantly, and generates accurate responses with multi-turn conversation context.
items.detail_benefit: First-contact resolution rate increased from 52% to 85%. Average response time dropped from 4 hours to 30 seconds. Support staff workload reduced 50%, freeing them to focus on complex technical cases.

items.title: Predictive Maintenance (PHM)
items.challenge: Unexpected equipment failures caused line stoppages — averaging 4 hours of lost capacity per incident
items.solution: AIoT continuous health monitoring with 48-hour fault prediction
items.benefit: Unplanned downtime down 70%, equipment lifespan extended 20%
items.detail_challenge: Manufacturing equipment lacked real-time monitoring. Fault symptoms were invisible until failure occurred. Each stoppage required emergency maintenance dispatch, costing 4+ hours of production capacity and substantial annual repair budgets.
items.detail_solution: AIoT sensors continuously collect vibration, temperature, and current data. PHM (Prognostics and Health Management) AI models analyze trends and predict failure risk 48–72 hours in advance, automatically dispatching maintenance work orders.
items.detail_benefit: Unplanned stoppages reduced 70%, prediction accuracy 88%, average equipment lifespan extended 20%, annual maintenance costs reduced 35%, and line utilization significantly improved.

items.title: Equipment Anomaly Trend Alerts
items.challenge: Early equipment anomaly signals hidden in data — impossible to detect manually
items.solution: AI multi-dimensional sensor analysis auto-identifies anomaly trends with push alerts
items.benefit: Anomaly detection accuracy 92%, maintenance costs down 35%
items.detail_challenge: Equipment anomalies initially manifest as subtle vibration increases, temperature fluctuations, or current deviations — changes buried in vast amounts of normal data. By the time anomalies become obvious, major repairs are often needed.
items.detail_solution: AI integrates multi-dimensional sensor data, applies time-series analysis and anomaly detection algorithms, learns normal equipment baselines, and issues tiered push alerts to maintenance staff when deviations are detected.
items.detail_benefit: Anomaly detection accuracy reached 92% with false positive rate below 5%. Average early warning lead time: 3 days. Maintenance costs down 35%. Critical equipment availability reached 99.2%.

items.title: AI+APS Smart Scheduling
items.challenge: Multi-site scheduling complexity and frequent rush orders rendered plans ineffective
items.solution: AI integrates finite-capacity constraints to auto-generate optimal multi-site schedules
items.benefit: Efficiency up 35%, planning time cut from 8 hours to 20 minutes
items.detail_challenge: Multi-site production required manual scheduling across machine capacity, material inventory, and staffing constraints. Frequent customer rush orders meant planners spent entire days rescheduling — and still couldn't reach optimal solutions.
items.detail_solution: AI+APS integrates multi-site capacity, tooling, and material procurement plans. Heuristic algorithms auto-generate optimal schedules across all sites, support rapid rush-order rescheduling, and visualize Gantt charts for floor managers.
items.detail_benefit: Production efficiency up 35%, inventory level down 28%, planning time cut from 8 hours to 20 minutes, rush order response time cut from next-day to within 1 hour, on-time delivery rate up to 95%.

items.title: Vibe Coding Mobile Reporting
items.challenge: Paper-based floor reporting caused 4-hour data delays and high error rates
items.solution: QR scan-to-report mobile app — AI auto-integrates real-time production actuals
items.benefit: Reporting accuracy up to 98%, data synchronized in real time
items.detail_challenge: Factory floor workers filled in paper report forms that office staff manually entered after each shift — causing 4+ hour delays in production actuals and an 8% manual entry error rate. Managers had no real-time visibility.
items.detail_solution: Mobile reporting app allows workers to scan a work order QR code for instant one-tap reporting. AI integrates production actuals, calculates efficiency, and syncs in real time with ERP/APS. Managers monitor progress via live dashboard.
items.detail_benefit: Reporting accuracy increased from 92% to 98%. Production data went from 4-hour delay to real-time. Floor anomaly response time cut 75%. Management decision quality significantly improved.

items.title: iPlan Supply Chain Collaboration
items.challenge: Opaque supply chain information led to frequent material shortages and line stoppages
items.solution: AI collaboration platform integrates supplier lead times and inventory with automatic risk alerts
items.benefit: On-time delivery rate up 25%, material shortage incidents down 40%
items.detail_challenge: No real-time data sharing existed between the company and suppliers. Buyers relied on phone calls and email to confirm lead times. Supply chain disruptions (material shortages, capacity issues) were only discovered at the last moment.
items.detail_solution: iPlan provides a supplier-dedicated portal integrating purchase orders, delivery confirmations, and inventory levels. AI automatically analyzes supply chain risk, pre-warns of potential shortages or delays, and recommends buffer stock or alternative suppliers.
items.detail_benefit: Order on-time delivery rate improved from 78% to 97.5% (+25%). Material shortage stoppages down 40%. Supplier management efficiency up 30%. Procurement accuracy significantly improved.

items.title: CeO Carbon Optimization System
items.challenge: Carbon data scattered across departments — hard to meet ESG disclosure and reduction targets
items.solution: AI auto-consolidates carbon data with scenario simulation and reduction pathway planning
items.benefit: Carbon calculation efficiency up 90%, ESG reporting cut to 2 weeks
items.detail_challenge: Manufacturing carbon emissions span energy, logistics, and supply chain — data scattered across departments. Traditional methods struggled to quantify accurately. ESG disclosure mandates and carbon neutrality targets made systematic carbon management urgent.
items.detail_solution: CeO AI auto-integrates plant energy, material usage, and logistics carbon data, calculates Scope 1/2/3 emissions per GHG Protocol, and provides scenario simulation to help companies develop optimal carbon reduction pathways.
items.detail_benefit: Carbon calculation efficiency up 90%, data accuracy improved 40%, annual reduction target achievement up 30%, ESG report creation reduced from 2 months to 2 weeks — effectively supporting investor and customer sustainability disclosure.

items.title: Product Carbon Footprint
items.challenge: Multi-tier supply chain carbon footprint calculation took 2 weeks with large margins of error
items.solution: AI tracks lifecycle carbon at each stage and auto-generates compliant footprint reports
items.benefit: Calculation time cut from 2 weeks to 2 days, accuracy up 40%
items.detail_challenge: Product carbon footprints require tracking emissions across raw material extraction, manufacturing, logistics, and end use — spanning multi-tier supply chains. Manual calculation took 2+ weeks, and inconsistent data formats across suppliers made error control difficult.
items.detail_solution: AI auto-collects supplier carbon data (PDF, Excel, and other formats), calculates per-stage carbon footprints per ISO 14064 and PAS 2050 standards, and generates compliant carbon footprint declarations automatically.
items.detail_benefit: Carbon footprint calculation time cut from 2 weeks to 2 days. Accuracy up 40%. ISO 14064 compliant. Directly usable for customer ESG audits or export compliance requirements.

items.title: IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Platform
items.challenge: IFRS S1/S2 disclosure requirements were complex — companies didn't know how to systematically prepare
items.solution: AI platform maps to the IFRS framework and guides step-by-step climate-related disclosure
items.benefit: Report preparation time cut 60%, compliance risk significantly reduced
items.detail_challenge: IFRS S1 (sustainability-related financial disclosure) and S2 (climate-related disclosure) require companies to disclose governance, strategy, risk management, and metrics across four dimensions — with extensive qualitative and quantitative data. Most companies didn't know where to start.
items.detail_solution: The AI platform has the IFRS S1/S2 framework built in, guiding companies through each disclosure requirement step by step. It auto-extracts relevant indicators from existing carbon data and financial statements, and performs AI compliance review to ensure report quality.
items.detail_benefit: Sustainability disclosure report preparation time cut 60% (from 3 months to 6 weeks). IFRS S1/S2 compliance pass rate significantly improved. Helped companies build sustainability credibility with investors and regulators.

items.title: AI Scrap Steel Grading
items.challenge: Scrap quality grading relied on subjective manual visual inspection — slow and inconsistent
items.solution: AI vision instantly analyzes scrap images and auto-grades quality and purity
items.detail_challenge: Scrap steel must be graded before purchase and smelting. Traditional grading relied on experienced workers visually judging scrap type, inclusion ratios, and grade — results were subjective, inconsistent, and slow, impacting purchasing efficiency.
items.detail_solution: Industrial cameras capture scrap images. AI vision models analyze composition, inclusion ratios, and corrosion levels in real time, automatically output grade classifications and suggested purchase prices, and log results for quality traceability.
items.detail_benefit: Grading accuracy reached 94% (surpassing human average of 85%). Per-batch grading time cut from 15 minutes to 90 seconds (10× faster). Consistency significantly improved. Annual scrap procurement costs reduced 8%.

items.title: Steering Wheel Foam Process Parameter Recommendation
items.challenge: Foam process parameters depended on veteran expertise — yield rates were unstable
items.solution: AI analyzes historical process data to auto-recommend optimal foam parameter sets
items.benefit: Yield rate improved from 78% to 92%, material waste down 18%
items.detail_challenge: Steering wheel foam molding involves multiple critical parameters — material ratios, temperature, pressure, and injection speed. Adjustments relied on veteran experience. New operator training took months, and environmental changes (humidity, temperature) caused yield fluctuations without scientific basis.
items.detail_solution: AI collects historical process data (temperature, pressure, material ratios, ambient conditions) and corresponding yield records to build a predictive model linking parameters to yield. When environmental or batch conditions change, it auto-recommends optimal parameter sets with adjustment ranges.
items.detail_benefit: Product yield improved from 78% to 92%. Material waste down 18%. New operator ramp-up time cut from 6 months to 2 months. Process adjustments evolved from 'by feel' to 'data-driven'. Quality stability greatly improved.
